name: Narrative Beats
description: Technical fixture for inline narrative beats and slide beat references.

narrative.name: Technical Proof
narrative.description: A compact arc that states the contract, proves it, and asks for adoption.

beats.name: Contract
beats.description: Describe the schema contract in one place.

slides.title: The Contract
slides.text: Narrative beats describe authoring intent without constraining slide structure.

slides.title: Evidence And Adoption
items: Slides can reference one beat or multiple beats.
Validators accept slides without beat references.
Renderers can use beats for outlines and speaker notes.
